title: Gather-Style Name Labels, Status Dots, and Co-location Grouping
description: Replace the current identity plate rendering with Gather.town-style rounded-pill dark backgrounds, clean sans-serif font, and colored status dots inline with name pills. Implement lightweight name grouping for overlapping plates.

scope.in: renderIdentityPlates() pill rendering, renderStatusIcons() status display, constants for pill geometry, name overlap grouping logic
scope.out: Character sprites, CEO crown, speech bubbles, interaction icons, activity icons, AgentStatus type expansion

dod.criterion: Name plates render as Gather.town-style rounded pills with dark background and white text
Colored status dots (green=working, gray=idle) render inline to the right of agent names
Overlapping name pills merge into grouped comma-separated labels
Activity icons and interaction icons continue to render correctly

sequencing_rationale: Task 1 establishes constants and cleans dead code so subsequent tasks have the right values and a clean import surface. Task 2 changes the pill shape (visual foundation). Task 3 adds the inline status dot into the pill created by task 2 and strips the old sprite-based status rendering. Task 4 builds on the plate data structures from tasks 2-3 to implement grouping logic.

tasks.title: Update pill geometry constants and remove dead code
tasks.user_scenario: Foundation constants for new pill style, removes unused code.
tasks.scope: In constants.ts: increase IDENTITY_PLATE_PAD_X from 4 to 8, IDENTITY_PLATE_PAD_Y from 2 to 5, IDENTITY_PLATE_HEIGHT from 12 to 22, add IDENTITY_PLATE_CORNER_RADIUS=11, STATUS_DOT_RADIUS=4, STATUS_DOT_GAP=5. In renderer.ts: delete unused STATUS_DOT_COLORS block and unused INTERACTION_DOT_COLORS import.

dod.criterion: IDENTITY_PLATE_PAD_X=8, IDENTITY_PLATE_PAD_Y=5, IDENTITY_PLATE_HEIGHT=22, IDENTITY_PLATE_CORNER_RADIUS=11 exported from constants.ts
STATUS_DOT_RADIUS=4 and STATUS_DOT_GAP=5 exported from constants.ts
STATUS_DOT_COLORS record deleted from renderer.ts (was dead code)
INTERACTION_DOT_COLORS removed from import statement in renderer.ts (INTERACTION_SPRITES preserved)
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

tasks.title: Replace sharp-rect identity plates with rounded-pill rendering
tasks.user_scenario: Agent name labels change from sharp-cornered dark rectangles to smooth rounded-pill shapes with more padding, matching Gather.town style.
tasks.scope: Refactor renderIdentityPlates() to use ctx.roundRect() with IDENTITY_PLATE_CORNER_RADIUS instead of ctx.fillRect(). Update pill width for status dot space. Increase BG_ALPHA to 0.75. Adjust task info card vertical positioning. Change text color to white (#FFFFFF) instead of per-agent brandColor.

dod.criterion: Name plates render as rounded pills (roundRect with corner radius 11) instead of sharp rectangles
Pill background uses alpha 0.75 for improved contrast against varied tile backgrounds
Name text renders in white (#FFFFFF) and is vertically centered within the pill
Pill width includes reserved space for the status dot to the right of the name text
Task info card still renders correctly below the pill with proper gap

tasks.title: Replace sprite status icons with inline colored dots in the name pill
tasks.user_scenario: Each agent's name pill shows a small colored circle to the right of their name — green for working, gray for idle — replacing the floating sprite icons.
tasks.scope: Draw filled circle using STATUS_DOT_RADIUS at right side of pill. Green (#22c55e) for working, gray (#9ca3af) for idle. Remove LimeZu and sprite-based status icon rendering paths from renderStatusIcons(). Preserve ACTIVITY_ICON_SPRITES and interactionMap.has() guard.

dod.criterion: Green dot (#22c55e) renders inline to the right of the name text for working agents
Gray dot (#9ca3af) renders inline to the right of the name text for idle agents
ACTIVITY_ICON_SPRITES still render above characters in furniture activity states
interactionMap.has() guard preserved — agents with active interactions skip status icon rendering
No dot renders for agents with no status

tasks.title: Merge overlapping name pills into grouped comma-separated labels
tasks.user_scenario: When agents stand close together, a single merged pill shows comma-separated names instead of overlapping individual pills.
tasks.scope: Replace overlap-reduce-alpha approach with merge-based grouping. Run grouping pass after computing plate rects. 70% overlap threshold. Merged pill shows comma-separated names centered at average position. Green dot if any member working. Groups of 4+ show first 2 + '+N more'. Task info cards suppressed for merged groups.

dod.criterion: When two agents' plate rects overlap >70%, a single merged pill renders showing both names comma-separated
Merged pill is horizontally centered at the midpoint of grouped agents' positions
Status dot in merged pill shows green if any grouped agent is working, gray if all idle
Groups of 4+ agents show first 2 names + '+N more' format
Non-overlapping agents still render individual pills with their own status dots
